entity.label: Naamah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city in the plain of Judah (Josh. 15:41), supposed by some to be identified with Na’aneh, some 5 miles south-east of Makkedah.

nodes.label: Naamah
nodes.description: A city in the plain of Judah (Josh. 15:41), supposed by some to be identified with Na’aneh, some 5 miles south-east of Makkedah.

verses.text: And Gederoth, Bethdagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:
